subject: Riolu, the Emanation Pokemon — Sinnoh Fighting-type small jackal-like creature depicted in a dynamic running or leaping pose
description: A small blue and black jackal-like creature is depicted in a dynamic side-running pose against an outdoor background with autumn or late-season foliage colors. The creature has a blue body, black face markings and pointed ear shapes, and small paw-like limbs in motion. The background shows warm orange and purple tones suggesting trees or foliage in fall colors. The creature's posture is energetic and forward-moving, consistent with its flavor text describing endless stamina.
foreground: small blue jackal-like creature running dynamically
background: autumn foliage in warm orange and purple tones
